attributes.Sql Query:
SEL 
  BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
  ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( ORDER BY BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ) + SRC_KEY.MAX_VAL AS OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
  OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
  BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
  FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
  LATEST_RECORD_FLG,
  OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
  PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT,
  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
  DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
  DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
  DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
  SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
  LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) , 
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  USER,
  DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
  XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/ 
  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,
  DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
  SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM
 ( 
 SELECT
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 BPDC.PROCESS_DATE AS OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
 OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
 DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
 BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
 OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
 DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
 LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG,
 FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
 LATEST_RECORD_FLG,
 BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 '=' AS PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
 OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT,
 DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,
 DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
 DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_AR_NAPLD_F B
 CROSS JOIN $$ETLVWDB.OLM_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
 WHERE B.OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT <=  BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 BPDC.PROCESS_DATE AS OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
 OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
 DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
 BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
 OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
 DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
 LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG,
 FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
 LATEST_RECORD_FLG,
 BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 '=' AS PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
 OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT,
 DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/ 
 SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,
 DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
 DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_AR_NAPLD_R B
 CROSS JOIN $$ETLVWDB.OLM_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
 WHERE B.OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT<=BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
 ) A
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY),0) AS MAX_VAL FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_DRVD_BKGS_MEASURE) SRC_KEY
 ON 1=1
